verses.text: Pasian in Noah leh a tapate thupha pia a, amaute tungah, “Pung un la, tampi pha-in, leitung dim un
Note pen leitung ganhing khempeuh, huih lak vasa khempeuh, leilakah a bokvak khempeuh leh tuipi ngasa khempeuh in hong kihta-in hong zahtak ding uh hi. Note' khutsungah tuate hong kipia hi
A nungta a gamtang peuhmah, note-a' dingin an hi ding hi. Kung hing khempeuh ka hong piak bangin na khempeuh zong note ka hong pia hi
A nuntakna ahi a sisan pen a sa tawh na ne khawm kei bek ding uh hi
Mi khatpeuh in hong thah leh ama tungah sihna dan ka pia ding hi. A hong that ganhing peuhmah ka that ding a, a mipihte a that mi peuhmah gim ka pia ding hi
Mi a that peuhmahte pen, midangte in amah that ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in ama lim bangin mi bawl hi
“Note, pungin khang un la, leitungah tampi tak piangkhia-in, tampi pha-in khang un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Pasian in Noah leh amah tawh a om a tapate kiangah
“En un, note leh note' khita na suanlekhakte uh leh
note tawh a om nuntakna a nei peuhmah, vasate, innsate, note tawh a om leitung gamsa peuhmah, teembaw sung panin a paikhia zahzah peuhmah tawh ka thuciamna ka kipsak hi
Nuntakna a nei khempeuh, tuiciin tawh susia kik ngei nawnloin, leitung a susia dingin tuiciin ka tun'sak kik ngei nawnlohna dingin note tawh ka thuciamna ka kipsak hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Pasian in, “Hih pen, kei leh note leh note tawh a om nuntakna a nei khempeuh kikalah mailam khang tawntungah thuciamna lim ahi hi
Meii sungah ka sakhituihup ka kaisak a, tua pen kei leh leitung kikalah thuciamna lim hi ding hi
Vantungah meii kong kaisak ciangin meii sungah sakhituihup a kimuh leh
kei leh note leh nuntakna a nei khempeuh tawh ka thuciamna ka phawk ding hi. Tuite pen, nuntakna a nei khempeuh a susia ding tuiciin suakkik ngei nawnlo ding hi
Meii sungah sakhituihup a om ciangin keimah in ka en ding a, kei leh leitunga a om nuntakna a nei khempeuh tawh tawntung thuciamna ka phawk ding hi,” a ci hi
Pasian in Noah kiangah, “Hih pen, kei leh leitunga a om nuntakna a nei khempeuh tawh ka kipsaksa thuciamna lim ahi hi,” a ci hi.
Teembaw sung panin a paikhia Noah' tapate, Shem, Ham, leh Jafeth ahi hi. Ham pen Kanaan' pa ahi hi
Hih Noah' tapa thumte panin leitung buppi mi tawh hong kidim hi
Noah pen lo kho masapa hi a, amah in leenggui lo khat a bawl hi
Amah in leenggahzu ne-in kham a, a puanbuk sungah bangmah silh loin a lum hi
Kanaan' pa Ham in a pa guaktangin a omna mu a, a pualama om a sanggam nihte kiangah a gen hi

Tua ciangin Shem leh Jafeth in puan khat la-in amaute gel' liangko tuakah baang uh a, a nung leh lamun pai-in a pa uh' guaktang omna a khuh uh hi. Amaute in maingat lo uh ahih manin a pa uh guaktang omna mulo uh hi
Noah a zukhamna panin a pilvan' ciangin ama tungah a tapa Ham' gamtatna thei a
amah in, “Kanaan in samsiatna ngah ta hen la, a sanggamte' sila hi ta hen
Topa ka Pasian in Shem thupha pia hen la, Kanaan, ama sila hisak hen
Pasian in Jafeth pungsak hen la, Shem' puanbukte sungah amah tengsak hen. Kanaan ama sila hisak hen,” a ci hi
Tuiciin a tun' khit ciangin Noah kum zathum leh kum sawmnga nungta hi
Noah' khan' sungteng pen kum zakua leh kum sawmnga hi a, tua ciangin amah a si hi.
